applied.subject: Revert 12 PRs merged without authorization
applied.notes: CRITICAL: Mega-commit reverting 12 PRs. 26-file conflict. Fork preserved: Write tool in gsd-verifier.md, theme architecture in statusline.js, useLinks mode, install-vibe.js, bin/install-opencode.js, agents/general-purpose.md, opencode/ dir, gsd-verifier root cause doc. Fork adopted from revert: Gemini runtime support (hasGemini, convertClaudeToGeminiToml), regex fix in gsd-verifier.md (\{} -> \{\}, \[] -> \[\]).

applied.subject: fix(install): add package.json to prevent ESM inheritance
